name: agent-skills
description: Planning skill framework for agent coding harnesses compatible with Anthropic's skill layout

skills.name: do-amend
skills.description: Amend an in-flight plan after requirements or scope change

skills.name: do-plan
skills.description: Create a dependency-ordered implementation plan using current repo context and relevant research

skills.name: do-start
skills.description: Execute the next unblocked task from a plan

skills.name: do-research
skills.description: Research workspace context, APIs, and external evidence, then persist a reusable memo for planning
